title: Fluent Bit Multiline Parser Buffer Limit Overruns
dataSources: Fluent Bit multiline filter/parser diagnostics in `fluentbit:log`
app: Container stdout stack traces ingested with multiline config
spl:
index=fluent sourcetype="fluentbit:log"
| search "multiline" AND ("buffer" OR "limit" OR "truncat" OR "incomplete")
| stats count by host, multiline_parser
| sort -count
description: Truncated stack traces break APM correlation and security investigations.
value: Ensures multiline buffers sized for longest stack frames.
implementation: Increase `Buffer_Max_Size` / `flush_ms` per vendor guidance; test with synthetic long lines.
knownFalsePositives: Latency spikes during pool exhaustion, garbage collection, or upstream slowness. We compare with the APM UI and deploy history before a code-only theory.
grandmaExplanation: We read the forwarder and buffer logs for stress and give-ups so we see log loss risk before disks or patience run out.
